description:
3 BHK + Maids | Ready to Move In | Middle Unit
Townhouse for rent in Camelia 1, Camelia
U N I Q Real Estate Broker proudly offers this spacious 3-bedroom townhouse located in Camelia 1, Arabian Ranches 2.
Camelia is a residential development in Arabian Ranches 2, strategically situated between Al Qudra Road (D63) and Sheikh Zayed Bin Hamdan Al Nahyan Street (D54). Camelia Arabian Ranches 2 is a project by Emaar Properties, subdivided into Camelia I and Camelia II.
Property Details:
• Built-Up Area: 1,506.95 sqft
• 3 Bedrooms, 4 Bathrooms
• 2 Storage Room
• Laundry Room
• Modern Kitchen with high-end finishing
• Built-in Wardrobes
• Landscaped Garden
• Unfurnished
• Vacant | Ready for Immediate Occupancy
• Maid's room with bathroom
Community Highlights:
• Quiet, family-friendly villa community
• Spanish-style homes with private gardens
• Landscaped parks and walking paths
• Shared swimming pools & children’s play areas
• Close to Arabian Ranches Retail Centre & Ranches Souk
• Near schools, nurseries & healthcare facilities
•Gated, secure, and well-maintained community
About Arabian Ranches
Arabian Ranches is a premium gated villa community in Dubai that’s all about upscale living with a desert-chic vibe. title: Rent in Camelia 2: Maids Room | Corner Unit | Amazing Area | Property Finder
description:
Maids Room | Corner Unit | Amazing Area
Townhouse for rent in Camelia 2, Camelia
Key Highlights:
- Size: 2,143 sq ft built‑up area on a 2,540 sq ft plot
- Layout: 4 bedrooms + maid’s room, 4 bathrooms
- Parking: Covered space for two cars
- Outdoor: Newly landscaped garden, large balconies, easy walk to communal pool, playground, and gym
- Amenities: Access to community gym, BBQ area, and children’s play zone
Available 30th December
4‑Bedroom End‑of‑Row Townhouse, Camelia 2, Arabian Ranches 2
Step into this bright, modern townhouse set in the family‑friendly enclave of Camelia 2. The end‑of‑row unit offers a wraparound garden on two sides and spacious balconies that extend from the upstairs bedrooms, creating a seamless indoor‑outdoor lifestyle.
Community Features of Camelia 2, Arabian Ranches 2
- Family‑friendly living – a gated, 24/7‑secured enclave with CCTV, designed for kids and families¹.
- Green spaces & recreation – lush landscaped gardens, parks, walking & cycling trails, multiple swimming pools, a fully equipped gym, children’s play areas, basketball/tennis courts, and BBQ spots.
- Pet‑friendly – open parks where pets can roam freely.
- Convenient amenities – close to Ranches Souk (supermarkets, cafés, retail), nearby schools and nurseries, easy access to major roads and just 15‑20 minutes to Dubai Miracle Garden, Global Village, and major malls.
- Community vibe – a community centre that hosts events and markets, fostering a close‑knit resident base that encourages social interaction.
- Located just steps from park pathways, the property blends privacy with convenience—ideal for families seeking a contemporary home in Arabian Ranches 2.
Contact Albert Vinicius Da Silva for more details.

title: Rent in Lila: Vacant | 5BR Villa | Type 4 | Great Condition | Property Finder
description:
Vacant | 5BR Villa | Type 4 | Great Condition
Villa for rent in Lila, Arabian Ranches 2
Exclusive Links Real Estate Brokers is beyond pleased to present this exceptional 5-bedroom residence, perfectly situated in the serene and upscale Lila community of Arabian Ranches 2. This standalone Type 4 villa combines elegant architecture with a spacious, functional layout, offering a premium lifestyle for families who value comfort and privacy.
Property Overview :
- 5 Bedrooms + Maid’s Room (Type 4)
- Built-Up Area: 3,846 sq. ft.
- Plot Size: 4,650 sq. ft.
- Outdoor Space: Private professionally landscaped garden
- Location: Ideally positioned just a short walk from the community pool and park
Ground Floor:
Designed for both utility and grand entertaining, the ground floor features a spacious living area bathed in natural light. A versatile bedroom/study provides the perfect space for guests or a home office. The heart of the home includes a closed kitchen, a dedicated laundry and storage room, and an en-suite maid’s room for added convenience.
First Floor:
The upper level is dedicated to family retreat, centered around a secondary family living space. The Master Suite is a standout feature, offering a private terrace and a generous walk-in closet. Three additional well-sized bedrooms complete this floor: one with its own en-suite and two sharing a smartly designed Jack-and-Jill bathroom.
Amenities & Lifestyle

Villa for rent in Lila, Arabian Ranches 2
Primal Alliance Real Estate is pleased to offer you this charming, Villa in luxurious Arabian Ranches 2 - Lila, for Rent.
Spacious villa, with a 4,650 Sqft Area. 5 Bedrooms - 6 Bathrooms - Balconies - Covered Parking
Summary:
- 5 Bedrooms
- 6 Bathrooms
- Maid room / Utility or laundry room.
- Amazing spacious kitchen.
- Spacious living room and dining area, bright and sunny with beautiful glass doors and a powder room.
- Splendid green Backyard area, suitable for a nice sitting out area and kids' playground.
- Balconies
- 2 Parking spaces
- Lots of storage and built-in wardrobes.
Amenities:
Lila amenities are shared with the wider Arabian Ranches 2 community, which includes barbecue facilities, a beauty salon, children's play areas, football pitches, a gourmet restaurant, a spa, squash courts, a state-of-the-art gymnasium, a swimming pool, and tennis courts.
Community & Location:
- Arabian Ranches 2 is a master planned community by developer Emaar Properties, located at the intersection of Al Qudra Road (D63) and Sheikh Zayed Bin Hamdan Al Nahyan Street (D54).
- The project was completed in Feb 2017
